title: Marketplace Manager - Rivigo South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Rivigo South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Marketplace Manager looking for your next big career move? Rivigo South Asia Partners in Coimbatore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rivigo South Asia Partners:
Rivigo South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo South Asia Partners!
